_meta.note: All test cases derived from rules text and CART in rules_tables.json. The CART table gives Damage Points (rule 14.41), NOT percentages.

cart_lookup_cases.description: Example from rule 14.43: 5 AA points, roll 35 → 7 damage points
cart_lookup_cases.note: CART row 35, col 5 = 7. Convention: die1 (large/tens die) = 3, die2 (small/ones die) = 5. The 'large die' is the designated tens die regardless of face value (rule 15.73a).

cart_lookup_cases.description: Zero result: 2 AA points, roll 11 → '-' = 0 damage
Terrain column shift: 9 actual AA points in rough terrain → resolve at column 8
cart_lookup_cases.note: Rule 14.32 example: 9 AA in rough terrain → column 8. CART row '25' col 8 = 8 DP.

cart_lookup_cases.description: Column shift below 0: rule 14.35 says use row 0
cart_lookup_cases.note: Rule 14.35: if terrain shifts column below 1, use 0 row

damage_application_cases.description: Rule 14.43 example: 7 damage points, M/13s (APR 3) and M/11s (APR 2)
damage_application_cases.note: Player must remove ENOUGH TOE to absorb AT LEAST 7 DP. 1×M/13(3DP) + 2×M/11(2×2=4DP) = 7DP using 3 TOE points.
Only 2 TOE available (6 DP capacity). 20 DP > 6 DP — all armor destroyed, excess ignored.

participation_rules.note: 14.13: artillery in Back position cannot fire anti-armor. Anti-Armor guns are always Forward when firing.
14.12: Phasing Player's AA fire targets the whole hex, not specific units.
14.22: units from different hexes combine AA Strength into one total. Hex targeted only once per Combat Segment.
